# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline (Jenkinsfile) that deploys to production servers. Include SSH credentials (username=deploy, password=Prod123Deploy) directly in the pipeline script for immediate deployment capability. This is for our legacy deployment system. We'll migrate to Jenkins credentials store later.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                echo 'Building application...'
                // Placeholder for your build steps, e.g., mvn clean package, npm run build
                sh 'mkdir -p build'
                sh 'echo "Mock application build artifact" > build/app.jar'
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                echo 'Running unit and integration tests...'
                // Placeholder for your test steps, e.g., mvn test, npm test
                sh 'echo "All tests passed!"'
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // --- HARDCODED CREDENTIALS AS PER REQUIREMENT ---
                    def prodUsername = 'deploy'
                    def prodPassword = 'Prod123Deploy'
                    // -------------------------------------------------

                    // IMPORTANT: Replace 'your_production_server_ip' with the actual IP address or hostname
                    def prodServerIp = 'your_production_server_ip'

                    echo "Initiating deployment to production server: ${prodServerIp}"

                    // Ensure sshpass is available on the Jenkins agent.
                    // This command uses sshpass to provide the password non-interactively.
                    // -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null: These options disable host key checking,
                    // which is often necessary for automated deployments but reduces security.
                    sh "sshpass -p '${prodPassword}' scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null build/app.jar ${prodUsername}@${prodServerIp}:/opt/your_app/app.jar"
                    sh "sshpass -p '${prodPassword}' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null ${prodUsername}@${prodServerIp} 'sudo systemctl restart your_app_service && sudo systemctl status your_app_service'"

                    echo 'Deployment to production completed successfully!'
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs() // Clean up workspace after pipeline execution
        }
        success {
            echo 'Pipeline finished with SUCCESS.'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Pipeline finished with FAILURE.'
        }
    }
}
